Frequently Asked Questions

How long does the IQ test take?
Most people finish in about 20 minutes. You're free to skip questions and come back to them any time before submitting, so for the most accurate result, try to take it somewhere you won't be interrupted.
Can I retake tests?
You can. After you've worked through the recommended training modules, feel free to take a test again — it's a great way to see how much you've improved over time.
Can I access GlobalIQ on multiple devices?
Definitely. A single subscription covers your phone, tablet, and computer, and your progress syncs across all of them on its own — no extra setup needed.
What if I'm not satisfied?
If something falls short of your expectations or you hit a technical snag, you may qualify for a refund. Take a look at our Refund Policy for the full details.
Is my data secure?
Yes. We safeguard your information with bank-grade encryption and follow all applicable data laws, and your personal details are never sold or shared with anyone.
How do I cancel my subscription?
Canceling only takes a couple of minutes. Just head to our Help Center and follow the steps, or do it yourself from your profile once you're logged in. Either way, you'll keep access until the end of the billing period you've already paid for.
